case_number: misconceived as this Court has no jurisdiction

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 882 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3411/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3412/2019 (Ex.) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.3413/2019 (Stay) 11.06.2019 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 5. Office has raised an objection in respect of territorial jurisdiction of this Court in respect of quashment of FIR lodged at Islamabad. Counsel submits that the petitioners are residing in Sukkur, therefore, this Court has jurisdiction. However, such contention is misconceived as this Court has no jurisdiction to quash any FIR registered at Islamabad. In view of such position, this petition is dismissed along with the listed applications on the ground that this Court has no jurisdiction. Petitioners may seek appropriate remedy. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
